# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-05-15 | **更新时间**: 07:14 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[20:10]` **CREATE Medicines 任命 Georg Schett 医学博士、Margrit Wiesendanger 医学博士、哲学博士和 Christopher Jewell 博士，加强临床和科学顾问委员会**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *CREATE Medicines Strengthens Clinical and Scientific Advisory Board with Appointment of Georg Schett, MD, Margrit Wiesendanger, MD, PhD, and Christopher Jewell, PhD* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **CREATE Medicines 宣布获得 1.22 亿美元 B 系列融资，以推进自身免疫性疾病和肿瘤学领域的体内 CAR 管道**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *CREATE Medicines Announces $122 Million Series B Financing to Advance In Vivo CAR Pipeline in Autoimmune Disease and Oncology* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **Genprex 合作者在 2026 年美国基因与细胞治疗学会年会上展示了 2 型糖尿病基因治疗的积极临床前数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Genprex Collaborators Present Positive Preclinical Data on Diabetes Gene Therapy for Type 2 Diabetes at the 2026 American Society of Gene and Cell Therapy Annual Meeting* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:45]` **Affinia Therapeutics 在第 29 届 ASGCT 2026 年会上展示了 AFTX-201 数据和 BAG3 相关扩张型心肌病的 UPBEAT© 临床试验设计，以及 BBB 渗透性 AAV 衣壳和专有制造方面的进展**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Affinia Therapeutics Presents AFTX-201 Data and UPBEAT© Clinical Trial Design for BAG3-Associated Dilated Cardiomyopathy, Alongside Advances in BBB-Penetrant AAV Capsids and Proprietary Manufacturing, at the 29th ASGCT 2026 Annual Meeting* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:01]` **Precision BioSciences 在美国基因与细胞治疗学会 2026 年年会上展示支持 PBGENE-DMD 进入临床的新临床前数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Precision BioSciences Presents New Preclinical Data Supporting the Advancement of PBGENE-DMD into Clinic at the American Society of Gene & Cell Therapy 2026 Annual Meeting* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:00]` **GEMMABio 在 ASGCT 2026 年会上推出杜氏肌营养不良症 (DMD) 项目，并展示下一代 DMD 和 1 型脊髓性肌萎缩症 (SMA1) 基因疗法的临床前数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *GEMMABio Unveils Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy (DMD) Program and Presents Preclinical Data for Next‑Generation Gene Therapies for DMD and Spinal Muscular Atrophy Type 1 (SMA1) at the ASGCT 2026 Annual Meeting* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:00]` **在 III 期 VOLGA 试验中，围手术期 IMFINZI® (durvalumab) 联合新辅助 EV 在肌层浸润性膀胱癌的无事件生存率和总生存率方面显示出具有统计学意义和临床意义的改善**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Perioperative IMFINZI® (durvalumab) plus neoadjuvant EV showed statistically significant and clinically meaningful improvements in event-free survival and overall survival in muscle-invasive bladder cancer in the Phase III VOLGA trial* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[18:00]` **ASGCT 和孤儿治疗加速器推出 CGTxchange——一个首个重新激活有前途的被搁置的细胞和基因治疗项目的市场**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *ASGCT and Orphan Therapeutics Accelerator Launch CGTxchange -- A First-of-Its-Kind Marketplace to Reactivate Promising Shelved Cell and Gene Therapy Programs* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[18:00]` **AviadoBio 在 ASGCT 2026 上展示 AVB-406 项目治疗阿尔茨海默病和其他 Tau蛋白病的积极临床前数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *AviadoBio Presents Positive Preclinical Data for AVB-406 Program in Alzheimer’s Disease and Other Tauopathies at ASGCT 2026* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[17:30]` **Atamyo Therapeutics 在针对 LGMD-R5 肢带型肌营养不良症的临床试验中，第一批接受 ATA-200 基因疗法治疗的患者取得了可喜的结果**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Atamyo Therapeutics Presents Promising Results in the First Patients Treated With Its ATA-200 Gene Therapy in the Clinical Trial Targeting LGMD-R5 Limb-Girdle Muscular Dystrophy* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>

---

## 🇨🇳 中国动态 (NMPA / Domestic Players)
- `[22:24]` **重庆扩大生物制药创新中心，医疗器械审批量增加**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Chongqing Medical Device Approvals Rise as City Expands Biopharma Innovation Hub* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>

- `[18:27]` **传统CAR-T过时了？不用化疗、只输25万细胞/公斤，体内“波浪式接力”杀癌，完全缓解且不复发！** [🔗阅读原文](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifkFVX3lxTFB5OGZFWUVLaGZZZnBMRjh6MkdCdmtSMG9NQ19vbmRXZEVJUVRYN2ZtY0QyOGJLUUZJX2ZMVmVsUXA0RC13YXhJdFVCZGRkT3diQmc5LWZtWGhUY2h6WnRpUWk0VnlHNG12dFRpUjBEeDB2aVRJanBuOXEzQVZzUQ?oc=5)

- `[14:05]` **“摆脱海外依赖”……首款国产CAR-T疗法Rimkato，启动9月纳入医保进程- 阿视亚经济** [🔗阅读原文](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5kZkRXVTA4bnFHRi1kUWkzNkV5LWVESS03RHhON3k1cXhmRjZjSWRINFhYR3BabU83eV9NVzE1VFduZHlFbDUxbVNYWktJYjNBWldYWkhsbjB3d3hGa2N6d0ExVVE?oc=5)
